overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire walking through a muddy railway station town at night. The character moves from a street lined with freight train cars, across railroad tracks, along wooden platforms past a horse-drawn carriage, and through a freight yard toward a lit underpass, illuminated by warm gas street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy street between freight train cars and town buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy street beside the Pacific Union freight train cars

entered.detail: row of wooden freight train cars with 'PACIFIC UNION' lettering visible on the side
wet muddy ground reflecting the warm lamplight
two-story brick building with illuminated windows and warm gas lamp outside
cast iron street lamp emitting warm amber light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow muddy street at night, flanked by Pacific Union freight train cars on the left and brick buildings with warm gas lamps on the right. The wet ground reflects the amber light as the character moves steadily forward through the enclosed corridor between the train yard and town structures.

events.description: character leaves the enclosed street and enters the open railway yard, stepping onto the gravel tracks

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and walking along the station platform edge

entered.detail: multiple sets of steel railway tracks with wooden ties and gravel ballast
raised wooden platform running parallel to the tracks
yellow warning sign on a wooden post reading 'NO SMOKING IN WOODEN BUILDINGS'
single-story wooden railway station building with lit windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the railway yard as the character crosses the gravel tracks. A small wooden station house appears on the left while the character passes a 'No Smoking' signpost, moving from the enclosed street into the more open rail yard under the dark cloudy night sky.

events.description: character passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage parked beside the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden platform past the station buildings and a parked carriage

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage with large wooden wheels parked beside the railroad tracks

entered.detail: wooden commercial building with a 'BOOTS' sign painted on the upper facade
black wooden carriage with large spoked wheels parked on the ground beside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden platform of the railway station, passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the right. A wooden building with a 'BOOTS' sign is visible on the left as the character continues alongside the tracks, with the dark sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: freight yard with open storage sheds and stacked goods

events.description: character enters the freight yard area with open storage sheds and stacked cargo

agents.ego_description: walking through the freight yard toward a lit underpass, passing stacks of cargo

entered.detail: open-sided wooden warehouse structure with a sloped roof
piles of burlap sacks and wooden crates stacked under the warehouse roof
dark underpass or tunnel entrance with warm light visible at the far end

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the freight yard, passing open storage sheds stacked with sacks and crates on the left. The tracks continue ahead toward a lit underpass in the distance, with the surroundings becoming more industrial and utilitarian as the character approaches the tunnel entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muddy railway town that transitions from a narrow, lamp-lit street into an expansive industrial freight yard. It begins by tracking the character through a tight corridor flanked by brick buildings and Pacific Union freight cars, where amber gas lamps reflect off the wet ground. As the character crosses the gravel tracks, the enclosed street opens into a wider rail yard featuring a small wooden station house and a no-smoking signpost under a dark, cloudy sky. The scene then shifts along a wooden platform, passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage and a building marked with a boots sign before moving past open storage sheds stacked with crates. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly utilitarian as the camera follows the tracks toward a brightly lit underpass in the distance.
